theme_and_archetype.rationale: Provides authority, clarity, and function-first usability required for a corporate internal tool while achieving the requested 'Modern corporate design' and 'Clean glassmorphism' via strict adherence to high-contrast dark mode and crisp borders.

typography.rationale: Outfit brings a modern, geometric tech-forward vibe, while IBM Plex Sans offers sterile, highly legible data presentation for tables and calendars.

layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align dense content and forms. Header elements optical alignment over geometrical.
layout_and_spacing.strategy: Mode B: 'Control Room' Grid. Dense, data-heavy layout where every widget stretches to match neighbors (h-full).

surface_styles.header: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 border-b border-white/10 z-50 sticky top-0
surface_styles.dashboard_card: bg-[#121214] border border-white/10 rounded-sm hover:-translate-y-1 hover:border-white/20 transition-all duration-200 shadow-sm
surface_styles.glassmorphism_modal: backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#09090B]/80 border border-white/15 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)] rounded-sm
surface_styles.inputs: bg-[#18181B] border border-white/10 focus:border-white focus:ring-1 focus:ring-white/30 rounded-none text-white transition-all
surface_styles.status_badge: px-2 py-1 text-xs font-semibold rounded-none border

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements must explicitly define text/bg on hover. Example: hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use specific properties: transition: transform 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease.
motion_and_interactions.loading: Subtle skeleton loaders or tracing-beam effect for initial dashboard mount.
motion_and_interactions.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Ensure focus outlines (ring) have high contrast.

components_instructions.forms: Use Shadcn Form, Input, Select, Calendar. Customize with rounded-sm, dense spacing. Validation messages must be crisp #EF4444 red.
components_instructions.calendar: Use Shadcn Calendar. Remove heavy dropshadows; stick to flat, 1px bordered grid layout. Highlight booked vs available dates using background tints from status colors.
components_instructions.buttons: Flat, sharp edges. Primary button: bg-white text-black hover:bg-zinc-200. Secondary: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-700 text-white hover:bg-zinc-800.
components_instructions.data_tables: Grid Borders style. border-collapse. Subtle borders on right/bottom of grid items. Remove last item border to create open edge.
components_instructions.icons: Use Phosphor Icons (yarn add @phosphor-icons/react) for a premium, consistent tech look. Weight: Duotone or Regular.

testing.attributes: Add `data-testid` to all forms, login buttons, room cards, calendar days, modal triggers, and status indicators using kebab-case role-based names.

auth_background.description: Abstract frosted glass texture over deep slate, for login page background

dashboard_hero.description: High-end corporate boardroom, for dashboard header banner or greeting section

empty_state.description: Empty minimalist office space, use for 'No Bookings' or 'Maintenance' blank slates
